title: agrostis tateyamensis
intro: Agrostis tateyamensis is a species of grass found in Japan, classified under the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Agrostis tateyamensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Agrostis tateyamensis is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
